prose.en: Authenticate {param:ia-03.01_odp.01} before establishing {param:ia-03.01_odp.02} connection using bidirectional authentication that is cryptographically based.

guidance.en: A local connection is a connection with a device that communicates without the use of a network. A network connection is a connection with a device that communicates through a network. A remote connection is a connection with a device that communicates through an external network. Bidirectional authentication provides stronger protection to validate the identity of other devices for connections that are of greater risk.

prose.en: {param:ia-03.01_odp.01} are authenticated before establishing {param:ia-03.01_odp.02} connection using bidirectional authentication that is cryptographically based.

objects.en: procedures addressing device identification and authentication
list of devices requiring unique identification and authentication
system configuration settings and associated documentation
Organizational personnel with operational responsibilities for device identification and authentication
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
Mechanisms supporting and/or implementing device authentication capability

guidelines.en: devices and/or types of devices requiring use of cryptographically based, bidirectional authentication to authenticate before establishing one or more connections are defined;
